title: task overview SH
excerpt: Überfällig Heute Morgen In den nächsten 7 Tagen Ohne Datum Ohne Zuweisung Nach Projekt Anderen zugewiesen
markdown:
###### Überfällig
```tasks
not done
sort by priority
due before today
is not blocked
show tree
short mode
tags include #SH
limit 15
```

###### Heute

not done
sort by priority

```

###### Morgen

not done

show tree

```


###### In den nächsten 7 Tagen
```tasks
not done
sort by priority
due after tomorrow
due before in 7 days
is not blocked
show tree
limit 10
tags include #SH
short mode
```



###### Ohne Datum
```tasks
not done
sort by priority
no due date
is not blocked
show tree
short mode
tags include #SH
```


###### Ohne Zuweisung
```tasks
not done
sort by priority
is not blocked
show tree
short mode
no tags
```

###### Nach Projekt
```tasks
not done
group by filename
sort by priority
is not blocked
show tree

```



###### Anderen zugewiesen
```tasks
not done
group by tags
sort by priority
is not blocked
show tree
short mode
has tags
tags do not include #SH
```
